FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Delegate ReorderCrossCommit

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another Reorderable (a deposit-style insert).

public delegate void ReorderCrossCommit(object? payload, int fromIndex, Reorderable? from, Reorderable to, int toIndex)

Parameters

payload object
The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another (a deposit-style insert).
fromIndex int
The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another (a deposit-style insert).
from Reorderable
The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another (a deposit-style insert).
to Reorderable
The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another (a deposit-style insert).
toIndex int
The ONE cross-list commit callback (plan E5-L3): the app removes the item from from at fromIndex and inserts payload into to at toIndex — one atomic model mutation, both lists re-render from it (signals-first). from is null (and fromIndex −1) when the drag came from a plain BoxEl.Draggable of the shared kind rather than another (a deposit-style insert).
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
